headline: Richard Hughes
body:
🔵🇸🇦 More on Richard Hughes to Al Hilal news. Simon Charles Francis started his work with the Saudi club, Al Hilal, within the technical management with the sports director Richard Hughes. Simon’s expected to be Richard Hughes’s right hand as the Englishman will join him at Al Hilal Club after the transfer period with Liverpool ends. 

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 For the record, Richard Hughes is the one who runs the Al Hilal Summer Club market and the Liverpool Club market. #LFC
